title: AIML Insights
drivers: High surface temperatures in Delhi are primarily driven by low albedo surfaces and impervious surfaces across built-up cores.

impact_estimates.cool_pavements: 8-14 C surface reduction in dense markets
impact_estimates.cool_roofs: 2-4 C indoor reduction, up to 12 C surface locally

recommendation: Deploy high albedo paint in Central Delhi and Karol Bagh first to capture up to 5.1 C average surface cooling.
